items.title: pandoc_lustre_converter
items.doc:
# pandoc-lustre-converter

[![Package Version](https://img.shields.io/hexpm/v/pandi)](https://hex.pm/packages/pandi)
[![Hex Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/hex-docs-ffaff3)](https://hexdocs.pm/pandi/)

Pandoc allows you to work with documents in a format-independent way.

This package's goal is to:

* Convert Pandoc documents to Lustre html
* Allow custom rendering by pattern matching on document elements

Example:

```gleam

```

Note that the package only works with Pandoc's JSON output, so your application will need to call `pandoc`  in order to work with specific document formats:

```gleam
import pandi/doc
import shellout

pub fn parse(raw_document: String, format: String) -> doc.Document {
  let cmd = "echo '" <> raw_document <> "' | pandoc -f " <> format <> " -t json"
  let assert Ok(result) =
    shellout.command(run: "sh", with: ["-c", cmd], in: ".", opt: [])
  let assert Ok(document) = doc.from_json(result)
  document
}
```

items.title: Action
items.doc:
```
pub opaque type Action(msg)
```
The type that converters should return.
Use the provided constructors `default` and `custom`.

Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.Action
pandoc_lustre_converter Action

items.title: BlockConverter
items.doc:
```
pub type BlockConverter(msg) =
  fn(doc.Block, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(msg)
```
A block converter is a function that takes a block
and returns and action, where an action is constructed using 
either `default` (converting the element in the default way)
or `custom` (giving a custom lustre element instead).

Example:



Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.BlockConverter
pandoc_lustre_converter BlockConverter

items.title: InlineConverter
items.doc:
```
pub type InlineConverter(msg) =
  fn(doc.Inline, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(msg)
```
A block converter is a function that takes an inline
and produces and action, where an action is constructed using 
either `default` (converting the element in the default way)
or `custom` (giving a custom lustre element instead).

Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.InlineConverter
pandoc_lustre_converter InlineConverter

items.title: convert_document
items.doc:
```
pub fn convert_document(
  document: doc.Document,
  block_converter: fn(doc.Block, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(
    msg,
  ),
  inline_converter: fn(doc.Inline, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(
    msg,
  ),
) -> element.Element(msg)
```

Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.convert_document
pandoc_lustre_converter convert_document
